name: Sauteed Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggplant lengthwise into 1/4-inch slices.
2. Sprinkle the slices with salt and let sit for 30 minutes.
3. Rinse the slices, squeeze out excess moisture, and pat dry.
4. Heat oil over medium heat.
5. Saute eggplant for a few minutes until soft. Remove to serving dish.
6. Saute sliced green peppers until just tender. Place next to eggplant.
7. Saute carrots until just tender and place next to green peppers.
8. Season with black pepper and cinnamon.
9. Sprinkle parsley over the eggplant and dill over the carrots.
10. Garnish with tomato and serve.
